articles.title: Two ISIS-linked women facing slavery charges after return to Australia - CNN
articles.description: Australian police said on Friday they had charged two women linked to the Islamic State extremist group with slavery offenses after they returned overnight from Syria, where they had been detained in a refugee camp for more than seven years.
